finding_results.notes: Replaced the multi-witness summary cluster with a dramatized witness exchange that includes concrete object/body detail and explicit room/panel reaction.

Reworked Chamber B dialogue to separate registers (Nam as institutional smoother, junior official as blunt threat, Ina as compressed refusal) and added a concrete leverage shift via a timed referral and stamped deferment withdrawal.

summary: Implemented both structural/craft fixes by converting the hearing's moral apex into scene-level testimony with embodied consequence and by differentiating Chamber B negotiation voices with an on-page condition change, while preserving chapter continuity outcomes and heading contract.
